pages.text: Chapansi and her best friend Luano love collecting inswa.

blocks.text: Chapansi and her best friend Luano love collecting inswa.

pages.text: They love to play on the old dirt road... ....even if Mama would tsk-tsk because the stones hurt her feet.

blocks.text: They love to play on the old dirt road...
....even if Mama would tsk-tsk because the stones hurt her feet.

pages.text: One day, big cars arrive. Mama calls them Caterpillars.

blocks.text: One day, big cars arrive.
Mama calls them Caterpillars.

pages.text: They cover the road in black stuff. Mama calls it tar.

blocks.text: They cover the road in black stuff.
Mama calls it tar.

pages.text: The road is smooth now. Like walking on a mattress!

blocks.text: The road is smooth now.
Like walking on a mattress!

pages.text: But when Chapansi and Luano go to the road to catch inswa... ... they only catch three!

blocks.text: But when Chapansi and Luano go to the road to catch inswa...
... they only catch three!

pages.text: Chapansi used to love playing chiyato with Luano. But there are no more stones on the road to play with.

blocks.text: Chapansi used to love playing chiyato with Luano.
But there are no more stones on the road to play with.

pages.text: Chapansi is worried. What if the inswa can’t breathe anymore?

blocks.text: Chapansi is worried.
What if the inswa can’t breathe anymore?
Chapansi kicks the road!

pages.text: Chapansi goes to Mama. ‘Don’t be sad, my child. Inswa will always find a way out,’ she says.

blocks.text: Chapansi goes to Mama.
‘Don’t be sad, my child. Inswa will always find a way out,’ she says.

pages.text: One rainy day, Luano comes running to Chapansi’s house. ‘Inswa is back!’

blocks.text: One rainy day, Luano comes running to Chapansi’s house.
‘Inswa is back!’

pages.text: Inswa is back! It defeated the road! Mama was right after all!

blocks.text: Inswa is back! It defeated the road!
Mama was right after all!
